title: 罕有發聲 中電米高嘉道理不割席：勿讓年輕人絕望 團結解危機

replies.msg:
近年作風低調的中電（002）及大酒店（045）主席米高嘉道理，於《南華早報》就近期香港政治形勢刊登全版廣告聲明，內容遠較大孖沙、大企業們的「止暴制亂」、「支持香港警察」、「支持特首施政」為貼地，他提及不支持暴力之餘，沒與香港年青人割席，表示「年青人是香港的未來，不能離棄他們於絕望之中」，認為是時候團結解決危機。

米高嘉道理聲明先提到嘉道理家族於香港紥根140年，指香港給予其家族共享繁榮的機會，過去一個世紀，得到中國人的歡迎，很榮幸成為香港由漁港轉型為全球大都會的一小部份。

米高嘉道理提到，其先父羅蘭士·嘉道理早於超過30年前已提到香港的獨特之處，引述其父指，香港在世界上，於兩種不同的意識形態、兩種不同政府制度之下，正要發展成為一個中立的接觸點。這種預測印證香港繁榮及增長，連結着中國的經濟發展。惟他表示，於這種根深蒂固的連結之下，令人沮喪地看到香港近期具挑戰性的狀況正在升級。

米高嘉道理不支持暴力，亦不相信暴力可以解決衝突，表示對法律的承諾及維護和平及秩序，是香港成功的基石。更重要是，長久以來香港的價值，在於有能力於共同尊重、理解及開放對話之下尋找解決方法，不要忘記香港是一個獨特的地方，是一個中立的接觸點（Neutral point of contact），永不言倦地取得平衡。

要為年青人創造希望

聲明提及，米高嘉道理他多次提出，年青人是香港的未來，不能離棄他們於絕望之中，大家有責任於社區重建互信，為年青人創造希望。

米高嘉道理指出，作為香港的一部份，他與其孩子都被灌輸了獅子山精神 - 力量、野心、動力、創意讓香港繁榮及幫助香港面對很多挑戰，而他這種家的信念並未減退，認為大家是時候團結及對承諾堅定不移，不僅對香港這個特別的地方，更要為這一代、下一代，尋求和平解決危機的方法。

身家近600億 持中電19%股權

米高嘉道理2003年獲頒金紫荊星章，具法國榮譽軍團司令勛章、藝術及文化部騎士勛章等榮譽，除中電及大酒店主席外，亦是長和（001）獨立非執董及提名委員會成員。嘉道理家族為顯赫大族，由上海發展生意至移居香港，收購中華電力成為其香港第一筆交易，讓家族取得成功至今時今日。

根據福布斯富豪榜，其家族身家為76億美元（折合593億港元），於香港富豪榜之中排名第九，其資產主要來自中電（002）股權，其持有19.03%中電股權，市值達到382億港元。

米高嘉道理聲明全文如下：

【A Letter to the People of Hong Kong】

The Kadoories first arrived in Hong Kong 140 years ago and this city gave us the opportunity to prosper. Over the past century we have been welcomed by the Chinese people and have been privileged to play a small part in Hong Kong's transformation from a bustling port to a dynamic metropolis on the world stage.

My late father often spoke about the uniqueness of Hong Kong. "This area of the world," he once said, "is going to develop as a neutral point of contact between two different ideologies and two different systems of government." This prediction made more than three decades ago is evident in the city's prosperity and growth, intrinsically linked to China's economic development.

With this deep connection, it is disheartening to see what has overtaken the city recently with the threat of a challenging situation escalating still further. I do not support violence nor do I believe that this should be the way to resolve conflicts. A commitment to the rule of law and maintaining peace and order is the cornerstone of Hong Kong's success. More importantly, our city's spirit that we have long valued is our ability to find solutions in mutual respect, understanding and open dialogue. We must not forget our unique place as that neutral point of contact and work tirelessly to restore the balance.

I have spoken many times of how our young people are Hong Kong's future. We cannot leave them in desperation or despair. It is the responsibility of us all to rebuild trust in the community and create hope for the younger generation.

Being a part of Hong Kong has instilled the lion Rock Spirit in me and my children - that energy, ambition, drive and creativity has powered our prosperity and helped us to face many challenges. My faith in our home is undiminished. Now is a time for everybody to unite and be unswerving in our commitment not just to Hong Kong's special place, but to peaceful solution to our current crisis for this generation, the next, and beyond.

The Honourable Sir Michael Kadoorie

https://hk.finance.appledaily.com/finance/realtime/article/20190828/59981340

quote.msg:
米高嘉道理聲明全文如下：

【A Letter to the People of Hong Kong】

The Kadoories first arrived in Hong Kong 140 years ago and this city gave us the opportunity to prosper. Over the past century we have been welcomed by the Chinese people and have been privileged to play a small part in Hong Kong's transformation from a bustling port to a dynamic metropolis on the world stage.

My late father often spoke about the uniqueness of Hong Kong. "This area of the world," he once said, "is going to develop as a neutral point of contact between two different ideologies and two different systems of government." This prediction made more than three decades ago is evident in the city's prosperity and growth, intrinsically linked to China's economic development.

With this deep connection, it is disheartening to see what has overtaken the city recently with the threat of a challenging situation escalating still further. I do not support violence nor do I believe that this should be the way to resolve conflicts. A commitment to the rule of law and maintaining peace and order is the cornerstone of Hong Kong's success. More importantly, our city's spirit that we have long valued is our ability to find solutions in mutual respect, understanding and open dialogue. We must not forget our unique place as that neutral point of contact and work tirelessly to restore the balance.

I have spoken many times of how our young people are Hong Kong's future. We cannot leave them in desperation or despair. It is the responsibility of us all to rebuild trust in the community and create hope for the younger generation.

Being a part of Hong Kong has instilled the lion Rock Spirit in me and my children - that energy, ambition, drive and creativity has powered our prosperity and helped us to face many challenges. My faith in our home is undiminished. Now is a time for everybody to unite and be unswerving in our commitment not just to Hong Kong's special place, but to peaceful solution to our current crisis for this generation, the next, and beyond.

The Honourable Sir Michael Kadoorie

A Letter to the People of Hong Kong
《致香港人書》

The Kadoories first arrived in Hong Kong 140 years ago and this city gave us the opportunity to prosper. 嘉道理家喺 140 年前初到貴境。當年嘅香港扶植我家嘅生意發展。

Over the past century we have been welcomed by the Chinese people and have been privileged to play a small part in Hong Kong’s transformation from a bustling port to a dynamic metropolis on the world stage. 咁耐以嚟，由初初嘅港口，到今日繁華嘅大都會，華人唔單止無嫌棄過我哋，仲畀機會我哋喺香港發展期間，出一分力。

My late father often spoke about the uniqueness of Hong Kong. 先父經常都提到香港嘅獨一無二之處。

“This area of the world,” he once said, “is going to develop as a neutral point of contact between two different ideologists and two different systems of government.” 佢話：「呢個地方，將會發展成一個『中立點』，連繫住兩套意式形態同兩種政治制度。」

This prediction made more than three decades ago is evident in the city’s prosperity and growth, intrinsically linked to China’s economic development. 從今日香港嘅發展，我哋可以睇得出，佢當年嘅預測係啱嘅。香港嘅繁榮同中國嘅經濟，係唇齒相依嘅。

With this deep connection, it is disheartening to see what has overtaken the city recently with the threat of a challenging situation escalating still further. 既然兩者嘅連繫係咁密切，所以睇住香港作為「中立點」嘅地位日益受到破壞，係令人痛心疾首嘅。

I do not support violence nor do I believe that this should be the way to resolve conflicts. 我唔支持暴力，我亦都唔認為暴力係解決問題嘅方法。

A commitment to the rule of law and maintaining peace and order is the cornerstone of Hong Kong’s success. 法治同治安係香港賴以成功嘅基石。

More importantly, our city’s spirit that we have long valued is our ability to find solutions in mutual respect, understanding and open dialogue. 更重要嘅係，香港人係講道理嘅。有咩唔啱，咪大家坐低四四六六拆掂佢囉。

We must not forget our unique place as that neutral point of contact and work tirelessly to restore the balance. 我哋千萬不能忘記，香港係一個（將中國同世界連接嘅）「中立點」 。我哋無論如何，都要回復呢個原貌。

I have spoken many times of how how our young people are Hong Kong’s future. 我多次強調，年輕人係香港嘅未來。

We cannot leave them in desperation or despair. 我哋唔可以迫佢哋上絕路。

It is the responsibility of us all to rebuild trust in the community and create hope for the younger generation. 我哋嘅責任，係要令到年輕人見到前路，令個社會有返信任。

Being a part of Hong Kong has instilled the Lion Rock Spirit in me and my children — 作為香港嘅一份子，獅子山精神一直都喺我同我小朋友嘅身體流動。

that energy, ambition, drive and creativity has powered our prosperity and helped us to face many challenges. 獅子山精神令我哋百戰百勝。

My faith in our home is undiminished. 我對香港好有信心。

Now is a time for everybody to unite and be unswerving in our commitment not just to Hong Kong’s special place, but to a peaceful solution to our current crisis for this generation, the next, and beyond. 而家要萬眾一心，解決當前危機、認清香港嘅特殊地位係不能動搖，為後世建立一個美好嘅香港。

-------------------------------------------------------------
